'''âs-z-f-t''' ('''kasazfetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:locust|locust]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-z-f-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:locust|locust]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-z-f-t
|-
! Lemma
| kasazfetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisazfetoko|thisazfetoko]] || [[word:jisazfetoko|jisazfetoko]] || [[word:shisazfetoko|shisazfetoko]] || [[word:kisazfetoko|kisazfetoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsazfetoko|thĂŠsazfetoko]] || [[word:jĂŠsazfetoko|jĂŠsazfetoko]] || [[word:shĂŠsazfetoko|shĂŠsazfetoko]] || [[word:kĂŠsazfetoko|kĂŠsazfetoko]]

|-

|}
